WEALTH MANAGEMENT & FINANCIAL PLANNING

Retire with confidence.
Not confusion.

A Portfolio Is Not a Plan.

You've spent decades building your savings. Now it's time to turn them into a retirement you can actually enjoy — with reliable income, lower taxes, and a plan that works even when markets don't.

Get Your Free Assessment → Free Book Chapter
"True wealth is the freedom to focus on what matters most."
1,000+ Families Served
25+ Years Experience
#1 Radio Show in Utah
PRECISION SERVICES

Five Pillars. One Plan. Zero Guesswork.

A comprehensive framework that turns your savings into reliable retirement income — with tax efficiency, market protection, and healthcare planning all coordinated.

PILLAR 01

Income That Lasts

Turn your savings into reliable income streams that last your entire lifetime — not just the good years.

Learn more →
PILLAR 02

Tax-Smart Withdrawals

Strategic withdrawal planning that could save you thousands in unnecessary taxes every single year.

Learn more →
PILLAR 03

Market Protection

Protect your portfolio during downturns without sacrificing the growth you need to stay ahead of inflation.

Learn more →
PILLAR 04

Healthcare Planning

The blind spot most retirement plans miss. A clear framework for the costs that catch retirees off guard.

Learn more →
PILLAR 05

Estate & Legacy

Go beyond a basic will. Protect your family's future and leave the legacy you've earned.

Learn more →
FOUNDER & PRESIDENT

Meet Mike Stevens

Investment Adviser Representative

25+ years fiduciary advisory Host, Retire Right Radio Author, Retire Right, Retire Now 1,000+ families served

Michael founded Capital Wealth in 2009 with a mission: help families retire with clarity, confidence, and a plan that actually works. Over 1,000 families and $500M+ in assets later, he's built a practice focused entirely on retirement income planning, tax optimization, and fiduciary advice.

"I'm passionate about helping people bring all the pieces of their financial lives together with clarity and purpose."
Meet with Mike → Learn More
As Seen and Heard On:
IN THE MEDIA

Capital Wealth Radio

Straight talk from experts with real guidance you can use.

Whether you tune in to Capital Wealth Radio on KSL, KNRS, or Newstalk, you'll access practical retirement advice to help you make smarter financial decisions — from tax strategies to Social Security timing.

Access Media Library →
FEDERAL EMPLOYEE SPECIALISTS

Your Service Deserves a Secure Retirement

Federal employees have one of the best benefits packages in the country — but maximizing FERS, TSP, FEGLI, and FEHB requires specialized expertise most advisors don't have.

SERVICE 01

FERS Optimization

Pension calculations, survivor benefits, retirement date optimization, and FERS supplement bridge planning.

Learn more →
SERVICE 02

TSP Management

Fund allocation strategies, traditional vs. Roth analysis, withdrawal planning, and rollover decisions.

Learn more →
SERVICE 03

FEGLI Analysis

Coverage review, post-retirement cost projections, and comparison with private alternatives to save thousands.

Learn more →
SERVICE 04

FEHB Coordination

Keeping FEHB into retirement, Medicare coordination, and optimizing your healthcare strategy.

Learn more →
500+ Federal Employees Served
$3,200 Avg. FEGLI Savings per Year
$780K Average TSP at Retirement
Explore Federal Benefits →

FREE BOOK CHAPTER

Retire Right, Retire Now

The Ultimate Guide to Retirement Income Planning

After helping 1,000+ families retire with confidence, Mike Stevens reveals the proven strategies that turn your savings into reliable retirement income. Download the first chapter free and discover:

  • Why a portfolio is not a plan (and what is)
  • The 5 pillars of successful retirement income
  • How to protect your savings from market volatility
  • Tax strategies that could save you thousands
  • The biggest mistakes people make with their retirement
Download Free Chapter → Discuss Your Situation

No email required. Instant download.

CLIENT SUCCESS STORIES

Real Results from Real Families

See what our clients say about their experience with Capital Wealth

"Mike and his team are the best! We previously were with two other financial planners whose fees were too high and their investment ability had no comparison to Mike. He was also the only one who addressed taxes. Mike got our retirement finances completely organized."
— Collette D.
"I was nervous to find a financial advisor because I feel like all the ones we've used just cared about how they could make money off us. After reading reviews of Capital Wealth, I gave them a try. Mike has been above and beyond helpful year after year."
— Christina L.
"Mike and his team at Capital Wealth are fantastic. They really take the time to understand your situation and build a plan that makes sense. I feel confident about my retirement for the first time."
— Ordinaryguy40
"My wife and I, as well as my mother-in-law, have been working with the Capital Wealth team for over a year and have found Mike and his staff to be very welcoming and knowledgeable. They lay out the best advice and options for our financial well-being."
— Julie E.
"We've been extremely pleased with our experience at Capital Wealth. The team is professional, responsive, and truly invested in helping us achieve our financial goals. They take the time to explain everything clearly."
— Cory M.
"Capital Wealth helped us navigate our federal retirement benefits with expertise that we couldn't find anywhere else. Mike understood FERS and TSP planning better than any advisor we've worked with."
— Robert K.
"The tax strategies Mike implemented saved us thousands in our first year of retirement. His attention to detail and comprehensive planning approach gave us peace of mind we never had before."
— Sandra M.
"Working with Capital Wealth was the best financial decision we made. They turned our scattered retirement accounts into a cohesive plan that actually makes sense. Highly recommend!"
— David & Karen T.
"Mike's radio show drew us in, but his personal attention and expertise kept us as clients. After 3 years, we're still impressed by the level of service and the results we're seeing."
— Patricia L.
